generations.full_prompt:
Create a professional data visualization for a tech news publication.

VISUALIZATION TYPE: Three main holographic metric panels: “Polymarket Integrations”, “Oracle Adoption Rate”, and “Market Prediction Accuracy”. Circular gauges display “Integration Progress” and “User Participation”. Pulsing connection lines link “Oracle Adoption Rate” to both “Polymarket Integrations” and “Prediction Accuracy”. Data flows animate between all panels, highlighting real-time system interconnectivity. Accents: cyan for active metrics, magenta for growth indicators, orange for prediction volatility.

CONTENT CONTEXT:
ElizaOS is expanding into prediction markets via Polymarket and Verifiable Oracle Thesis integrations.

STYLE: Holographic heads-up display with neon metrics, glitch effects, and futuristic UI elements. Sci-fi interface aesthetic.

REQUIREMENTS:
- Professional infographic/dashboard quality
- Clean, polished vector aesthetic
- Include section headers and labels where appropriate
- Strategic use of color to highlight key insights
- Editorial publication quality
- Modern, sophisticated design, cyberpunk HUD, holographic interface, neon glow, futuristic, sci-fi
